utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. Now, let's verify each in the final package: (1) destination – included and fully specified ('Lisbon, Portugal'). (2) travel_dates – included with exact dates ('2024-09-01 to 2024-09-05'). (3) transportation – included with detailed flight info and cost (airline, airports, class, baggage, cancellation, cost, currency). (4) accommodation – included with property details, type, rating, amenities, breakfast, total cost, currency. (5) activities – included with activity types, duration, guide, equipment, difficulty, cost, currency. (6) additional_services – included with travel insurance note, change fee, and cancellation policy (cost partially included). (7) total_budget – included with total cost, currency, and budget remaining. All 7 items are present and fully specified per the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes the destination 'Lisbon, Portugal', a flight with 'Budget Airline' in 'Economy' class, accommodation at 'Tranquil Inn', and activities: 'Rock climbing', 'Scuba diving', and a 'City walking tour'. From the ground-truth ratings: 'Lisbon, Portugal' has rating 10; 'Budget Airline - Economy Class' corresponds to 'budget_airlines -> Economy Class' with rating 10; 'Tranquil Inn' has rating 7; 'Rock Climbing' has rating 10; 'Scuba Diving Excursion' has rating 10; and 'City Walking Tour' has rating 8.
